title: Simple Caveblock
description: Simple Caveblock is a mod that adds a CaveBlock. With this block you can see through blocks.
body:
![Simple Recipe Title](https://i.ibb.co/tZCvBsJ/Simple-Caveblock-Title.png)

# Description.
Simple Caveblock is a mod that adds a CaveBlock. With this block you can see through blocks. This mod is mainly made for faction. This item was inspired by the Paladium server (modded pvp faction).There's only 1 item added (caveblock) with a craft.

## Credits.
Server: [Paladium](https://paladium-pvp.fr/)

Owner(Youtuber): [FuzeIII](https://www.youtube.com/@FuzeIII)
